name: backup_restore_v1
description: adapterOS backup and disaster recovery training data: backup procedures for SQLite/content-store/keys, restore workflows with integrity verification, disaster recovery runbooks, Ed25519 key management lifecycle, and recovery testing strategies.

entries.notes: 1500 examples across five categories: backup_procedures (300), restore_procedures (300), disaster_recovery (300), key_management (300), testing_recovery (300). All examples grounded in the actual adapterOS backup scripts (scripts/backup/), secd key rotation daemon, sealed adapter container format, and SQLite/content-addressed store architecture.

provenance.review_notes: All backup procedures, encryption parameters, file paths, and verification steps sourced directly from the production backup scripts. Key management examples reference the actual Ed25519/ECDSA Secure Enclave integration and rotation daemon configuration. Sealed adapter container format (BLAKE3 + Ed25519) referenced for re-signing scenarios. SQLite .backup command, WAL mode, and PRAGMA integrity_check usage verified against implementation.

evaluation_gates: encryption uses aes-256-gcm with pbkdf2 iter=100000 sha256 (cbc fallback mentioned where appropriate)
SQLite backup uses .backup command, never raw file copy during concurrent access
restore procedures include PRAGMA integrity_check verification
checksum verification uses shasum -a 256 with LC_ALL=C sorted file listing
key backup references Ed25519 signing keys and Secure Enclave/Keychain provider modes
RPO/RTO targets are stated as max 1 hour data loss and max 30 minutes restore
content-addressed store operations reference BLAKE3 hashing and .aos sealed container format
environment variables use AOS_ prefix matching actual script configuration
disaster recovery includes tick ledger Merkle chain re-verification step
intent: Teach adapters to plan, execute, verify, and troubleshoot adapterOS backup and disaster recovery operations including SQLite snapshots, content-addressed adapter store backup, Ed25519 key lifecycle management, encrypted off-site replication, and full-system restore with integrity verification.

subcategories.backup_procedures: Step-by-step backup workflows for each adapterOS component: SQLite database via .backup command, content-addressed adapter store via rsync with hardlinks, configuration files, signing keys to secure storage. Includes scheduling (hourly DB, daily content store, weekly full), retention policies, encryption, and off-site replication.
subcategories.restore_procedures: Step-by-step restore from encrypted backups: decryption with key file, tarball extraction, checksum verification against checksums.txt manifest, SQLite PRAGMA integrity_check, rsync staging to target var/ directory, health check via adapteros-server /health endpoint, and post-restore consistency validation.
subcategories.disaster_recovery: Full catastrophic failure scenarios: complete data center loss, partial corruption, split-brain after network partition. Off-site backup retrieval, restore time estimates against 30-minute RTO, data loss assessment against 1-hour RPO, manual intervention requirements, and service re-registration workflows.
subcategories.key_management: Ed25519 signing key lifecycle: generation via Secure Enclave or Keychain provider, encrypted backup to separate secure storage, rotation via rotation daemon with signed audit receipts, key loss implications for sealed adapter verification, re-signing workflows, and trust chain rebuild procedures.
subcategories.testing_recovery: Regular restore drill procedures: CI smoke test pipeline (backup -> verify -> restore), non-destructive backup integrity verification via verify-backups.sh, live health check after restore, checksum diff validation, database integrity checks, and automated recovery confidence scoring.
